Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''paddle''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''webhook''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''environment''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { Paddle } = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const p = new Paddle\(''test''\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p.transactions\)\).filter\(m => m !== ''constructor''\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const p = new sdk.Paddle\(''test''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(p\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const p = new sdk.Paddle\(''test''\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(p.transactions\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const p = new sdk.Paddle\(''test''\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(p.customerPortalSessions\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const e = sdk.EventName; console.log\(Object.values\(e\).filter\(v => v.toString\(\).includes\(''subscription''\) || v.toString\(\).includes\(''transaction''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const v = new sdk.WebhooksValidator\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(v\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 aws logs describe-log-groups --log-group-name-prefix "/aws/lambda/RivalScan-dev-Api" --region us-east-1 --query 'logGroups[?contains\(logGroupName, `Onboard`\)].logGroupName' --output text)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 aws stepfunctions list-executions --state-machine-arn arn:aws:states:us-east-1:076561717141:stateMachine:RivalScan-dev-Pipeline-DailyPipeline --max-items 3 --region us-east-1 --output json)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 aws stepfunctions describe-execution --execution-arn arn:aws:states:us-east-1:076561717141:execution:RivalScan-dev-Pipeline-DailyPipeline:a034833a-8701-46f8-89cb-9db553f7bfa2 --region us-east-1 --query '{input:input, output:output, status:status}' --output json)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 aws stepfunctions describe-execution --execution-arn arn:aws:states:us-east-1:076561717141:execution:RivalScan-dev-Pipeline-DailyPipeline:ba99f553-8298-4f46-8b24-53190c77d26a --region us-east-1 --query '{input:input, output:output, status:status}' --output json)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 aws stepfunctions get-execution-history --execution-arn arn:aws:states:us-east-1:076561717141:execution:RivalScan-dev-Pipeline-DailyPipeline:a034833a-8701-46f8-89cb-9db553f7bfa2 --region us-east-1 --query 'events[?type==`TaskStateEntered` || type==`TaskStateExited` || type==`TaskFailed` || type==`ExecutionFailed`].{time:timestamp,type:type,name:stateEnteredEventDetails.name,exitName:stateExitedEventDetails.name}' --output json)
